problems.diagnostic: Target (port spec) points to Types  speed.speed_impl (entity reference), which is not of an adequate kind
problems.cause: AGREE cannot reference AADL port types directly; port names must be used as expressions
problems.minimal_edit: Replace `Target` with `Target.value` in the AGREE annex

problems.diagnostic: Actual (port spec) points to Types  speed.speed_impl (entity reference), which is not of an adequate kind
problems.cause: AGREE cannot reference AADL port types directly; port names must be used as expressions
problems.minimal_edit: Replace `Actual` with `Actual.value` in the AGREE annex

executor_steps: In the AGREE annex block, change `variable e = Target - Actual;` to `variable e = Target.value - Actual.value;`
In the AGREE annex block, change `variable e_dot = diff(e, time);` to `variable e_dot = diff(e, time);` (no change needed for this line)
In the AGREE annex block, change `variable e_int = integ(e, time);` to `variable e_int = integ(e, time);` (no change needed for this line)

In the AGREE annex block, change `guarantee "Actuator_Input control law": Actuator_Input = P * e + D * e_dot + I * e_int;` to `guarantee "Actuator_Input control law": Actuator_Input.value = P * e + D * e_dot + I * e_int;`
